steps.title: Name a specific nickname
steps.content: The student wants an example of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname. The answer must name a particular nickname, not just say that nicknames are common or that a specimen exists.

steps.title: Reject general dinosaur facts
steps.content: Choice A mentions a nicknamed specimen but never gives the nickname. Choice B only says many specimens receive nicknames. Choice D describes the fossil specimen without naming its nickname. The remaining choice identifies Wyrex as the nickname of the specimen. The answer is C.
